translated: The blue traffic light was really striking.
And since Mizuki was born in summer, on August 27th... Happy Birthday!
I didn't mean to say it so casually, but Happy Birthday to them.
Even though they're a summer baby, I feel like they haven't had
that many summer-themed illustrations until now.
I always felt like they usually wore long sleeves or clothes that covered their skin,
though they've had things like T-shirts before.
So I was really happy to see an illustration that feels so refreshing and screams "summer" the moment you look at it.
